title: Dual Side Potato Fries Maker Machine
description: Automated deep fryer with Arduino PID oil temperature control (175°C) and servo-actuated basket that auto-flips at 3 min to uniformly brown fries on both sides.
objective: Maintain oil at 175°C ±2°C; auto-flip basket at 3 min; buzzer alert on cycle completion; SSR-controlled 2 kW heater; safety thermal cutout.
constraints: 230 V mains; 2 kW heater; 2 L oil capacity; BOM < ₹3000; kitchen countertop unit.
supporting_fact_titles: Deep-Fry Immersion Heating — Oil Temperature Control
design_element_titles: Dual-Side Potato Fries Maker — Heated Oil Basin with Auto-Flip Basket

element_usage_notes.Dual-Side Potato Fries Maker — Heated Oi: SSR controls 2 kW heater; SG5010 servo flips basket 180° at t=3 min.
element_usage_notes.Solid-State Relay Mains Actuator Switchi: Zero-crossing SSR on 230 V 2 kW heater element.
